Title: H3: Unbounded Chunked Cookie Count in Session Cleanup Loop may Lead to Denial of Service
Description: The `setChunkedCookie()` and `deleteChunkedCookie()` functions in h3 trust the chunk count parsed from a user-controlled cookie value (`__chunked__N`) without any upper bound validation. An unauthenticated attacker can send a single request with a crafted cookie header (e.g., `Cookie: h3=__chunked__999999`) to any endpoint using sessions, causing the server to enter an O(n²) loop that hangs the process.
NotImpacted: All versions before 2.0.0-beta.4, all versions starting from 2.0.1-rc.18
